channel.title: Game Changer
channel.description: Latest releases from Game Changer on Dropout.tv

item.title: Behind the Scenes of "Crowd Control"
item.description:
A behind the scenes look at Game Changer's "Crowd Control."

Duration: 15:56

Tags: Game Changer, sam reich, rules, challenges, game shows, competitions, improv, surprises, not like the other, mad skills, unscripted, paul robalino, jazzy collins, sam geer, ryan creamer, kevin stiller, chloe badner, justin cyrul, behind the scenes

item.title: Crowd Control
item.description:
Jeff, Gianmarco, and Josh do some crowd work.

Duration: 40:05

Tags: Game Changer, sam reich, rules, challenges, game shows, competitions, improv, surprises, not like the other, mad skills, unscripted, jeff arcuri, gianmarco soresi, josh johnson, chris grace, paul robalino, ash kron, nico romero

item.title: Earnest-est
item.description:
Ally, Zac, and Lisa try to be as sincere as possible.

Duration: 45:00

Tags: Game Changer, sam reich, rules, challenges, game shows, competitions, improv, surprises, not like the other, mad skills, unscripted, ally beardsley, zac oyama, lisa gilroy, paul f. tompkins, ash kron, nico romero
